case_title: MARY GRAY RANZAL et al VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
